name: engram
description: Engram memory for Codex. Adds repository-aware MCP memory tools, old-session fact extraction, simple context retrieval, automatic Git metadata injection, and scoped memory skills.

interface.shortDescription: Repository-aware memory for AI coding workflows
interface.longDescription: Engram adds durable user, repository, and organization memory to Codex. Store decisions, conventions, and project context, extract long-term facts from old sessions, then retrieve approved memories through MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Get relevant Engram context for this task
Extract durable Engram facts from this old session
Remember this repository convention in Engram
